palma_valencia.name: Palma -> Valencia

current_validation.suitability: no route-specific SOCIB current observation configured

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

marseille_cagliari.route_note: Major French-to-Sardinia transit corridor passing west of Corsica; watch out for Mistral wind-wave acceleration in the Gulf of Lion.

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

toulon_cagliari.route_note: Toulon to Cagliari corridor, passing west of Corsica; watch out for northern and northwesterly wind acceleration.

marseille_toulon.name: Marseille -> Toulon

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

marseille_toulon.route_note: Short coastal transit along the French Riviera, highly sheltered but can experience Mistral gusts exiting bays.

marseille_palma.name: Marseille -> Palma

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

toulon_palma.name: Toulon -> Palma

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

toulon_palma.route_note: North-to-South crossing from Toulon to Palma; fully exposed to the Gulf of Lion and Balearic Sea swell.

barcelona_marseille.name: Barcelona -> Marseille

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

barcelona_marseille.route_note: Coastal and offshore route crossing the Gulf of Lion; notorious for severe Tramontana and Mistral conditions.

barcelona_genoa.name: Barcelona -> Genoa

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

barcelona_genoa.route_note: Extensive West-to-East transit across the Gulf of Lion and Ligurian Sea; fully exposed to winter storm corridors.

genoa_toulon.name: Genoa -> Toulon

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

genoa_toulon.route_note: Ligurian-Riviera coastal transit down to Toulon port; relatively protected from southern winds but exposed to strong North/Northwesterly offshore flows.

genoa_marseille.name: Genoa -> Marseille

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

genoa_marseille.route_note: Ligurian Sea passage to Marseille; exposed to the Mistral exiting the Rhone valley.

palma_monaco.name: Palma -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

palma_monaco.route_note: Long crossing from Mallorca to the French/Italian Riviera; exposed to Gulf of Lion swell and Mistral/Tramontane acceleration before the Monaco approach.

ibiza_monaco.name: Ibiza -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

ibiza_monaco.route_note: Long open-water passage from Ibiza to the Riviera, fully exposed across the Gulf of Lion before the Monaco approach.

formentera_monaco.name: Formentera -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

formentera_monaco.route_note: Extended Balearic-to-Riviera crossing; watch for building northwesterly swell in the Gulf of Lion.

menorca_monaco.name: Menorca -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

menorca_monaco.route_note: Menorca to Riviera crossing; moderate open-water exposure with a shorter Gulf of Lion transit than routes originating further west.

cabrera_monaco.name: Cabrera -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

cabrera_monaco.route_note: South Mallorca to Riviera crossing; open-water exposure across the Balearic and Ligurian basins.

valencia_monaco.name: Valencia -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

valencia_monaco.route_note: Long west-to-east crossing of the entire western basin; a multi-day passage exposed to the Gulf of Lion's Mistral and Tramontane winds.

barcelona_monaco.name: Barcelona -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

barcelona_monaco.route_note: Catalan coast to Riviera transit crossing the Gulf of Lion, notorious for severe Tramontane and Mistral conditions.

tarragona_monaco.name: Tarragona -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

tarragona_monaco.route_note: Mainland transit from Tarragona across the Gulf of Lion to the Riviera; open sea conditions with frequent North/Northwest wind acceleration.

palamos_monaco.name: Palamos -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

palamos_monaco.route_note: Short-hop Catalan coast to Riviera crossing; the closest Spanish mainland departure point to Monaco, still exposed to Gulf of Lion wind-wave build-up.

montpellier_monaco.name: Montpellier -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

montpellier_monaco.route_note: Coastal transit from Sète along the French Riviera to Monaco; watch for Mistral gusts exiting the Gulf of Lion early in the passage.

marseille_monaco.name: Marseille -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

marseille_monaco.route_note: Riviera coastal run east from Marseille past Toulon and Cannes into Monaco; generally sheltered but can see Mistral gusts exiting bays.

toulon_monaco.name: Toulon -> Monaco

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

toulon_monaco.route_note: Short French Riviera coastal transit from Toulon past Cannes and Nice into Monaco; sheltered but watch for local wind acceleration off the coastal capes.

monaco_genoa.name: Monaco -> Genoa

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

monaco_genoa.route_note: Ligurian Riviera coastal transit east to Genoa; relatively sheltered but exposed to strong North/Northeasterly offshore flows.

monaco_cagliari.name: Monaco -> Cagliari

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

monaco_cagliari.route_note: Long south-bound crossing from the Riviera through the Ligurian and Sardinian Seas to Cagliari; fully exposed once clear of the Ligurian coast.

monaco_naples.name: Monaco -> Naples

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

monaco_naples.route_note: Long Tyrrhenian Sea crossing from the Riviera to Naples; a multi-day passage exposed to westerly gale swells funneling between Corsica/Sardinia and the mainland.

monaco_palermo.name: Monaco -> Palermo

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

monaco_palermo.route_note: Extended repositioning route from the Riviera down the Tyrrhenian Sea and past western Sicily to Palermo; long open-water exposure for most of the passage.

monaco_messina.name: Monaco -> Messina

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

monaco_messina.route_note: Long repositioning route down the Tyrrhenian Sea and past the Aeolian Islands to the Messina Strait; a multi-day passage best planned around a settled weather window.

barcelona_cagliari.name: Barcelona -> Cagliari

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route until EMODnet wave platforms are fully configured

barcelona_cagliari.route_note: Strategic West-to-East crossing from Barcelona to Cagliari; subject to significant waves building across the Algerian Basin.

cagliari_naples.name: Cagliari -> Naples

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route across the Tyrrhenian Sea

cagliari_naples.route_note: Open Tyrrhenian Sea crossing of approximately 240 nautical miles. Cruising vessels should watch out for westerly gale swells funneling between Sardinia and Italy.

palermo_naples.name: Palermo -> Naples

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

palermo_naples.route_note: A scenic transit from Sicily to Naples of ~170 nautical miles passing west of Stromboli and the Aeolian Islands.

naples_marseille.name: Naples -> Marseille

validation.suitability: forecast-only multi-segment repositioning route

naples_marseille.route_note: Long-range early-to-late season repositioning route (~450 nm) traversing the northern Tyrrhenian, Bonifacio Strait, and the Gulf of Lion (Mistral zone).

montpellier_palma.name: Montpellier -> Palma

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

montpellier_palma.route_note: Long-distance crossing from Sète/Montpellier to Mallorca crossing the Gulf of Lion.

montpellier_barcelona.name: Montpellier -> Barcelona

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

montpellier_barcelona.route_note: Coastal and offshore route from Montpellier along the Pyrenean coast to Barcelona.

montpellier_marseille.name: Montpellier -> Marseille

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

montpellier_marseille.route_note: Short coastal run across the northern Gulf of Lion from Sète to Marseille.

montpellier_genoa.name: Montpellier -> Genoa

validation.suitability: forecast-only transit route

montpellier_genoa.route_note: Coastal transit from Sète along the French Riviera to the Ligurian port of Genoa.
